textByHash.131a67a333848f9d3073ad7df82c31e95916f545: Okay, well, you know where to find me if you change your mind.
textByHash.592b0d53b896299f5ec98701506243018792c5f8: No. Elder Raley's teaching me to become a herbalist myself, but he's always quite busy, so I normally look after the stall for him.
textByHash.76234d21ae0da1afabb93d3cd51cd796efb8bfb3: Hello, human. I'm afraid I can't help you with anything until we've sorted out all the problems that gryphon caused.
textByHash.8de41ff46458ae73454117cce4ae26962a2191b1: Welcome to Elder Raley's Herblore Stall. Would you like to buy some herblore supplies?
textByHash.d2fd234a952cfe375e7e5918f98c410fa18be476: So, would you like to buy some herblore supplies?
